prompt: I already have some preferred terms: Stent should always be 'stent', Kartusche should be 'cartridge', and Herzklappe should be 'heart valve'. Scan for the rest and give me options.

assertions.description: Pre-selected terms (Stent, Kartusche, Herzklappe) are included as-is without alternatives
Still proposes translations for terms NOT in the pre-selected list
The glossary.tsv includes both pre-selected and new terms
Does not suggest different translations for the 3 pre-selected terms
